summary: Completed issue 099 locally. SpecBridge now has a deterministic `preflight-runtime-launches` CLI command, runtime preflight schema, runtime preflight validator, CLI tests, documentation, and file-backed issue 099 preflight evidence. The command reads prepared runtime launch plans and verifies required slices, non-overlapping write scopes, per-launch budget, tool allow-list, and plan-only execution policy without launching Claude Code, launching Antigravity, executing shell commands, calling GitHub, installing dependencies, touching secrets, touching production, or deploying.
validations: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/specbridge.ps1 preflight-runtime-launches -InputPath ".specbridge/runtime-launches/issue-097-status.runtime-launch.json,.specbridge/runtime-launches/issue-097-tests.runtime-launch.json,.specbridge/runtime-launches/issue-097-docs.runtime-launch.json" -RequiredSlice status,tests,docs -AllowedTool Read,Write,Edit -MaxBudgetUsd 2.00 -OutputPath .specbridge/preflights/issue-099-runtime-launch-preflight.runtime-preflight.json -Force: passed
policy_result: Passed locally. Work stayed inside the issue 099 execution contract and scope manifest. The preflight command is deterministic and plan-only. It reads runtime launch artifacts and optionally writes a preflight artifact, but it does not launch Claude Code, launch Antigravity, execute shell commands, call GitHub, install dependencies, access secrets, touch production, change auth or authorization security, change databases, weaken CI/CD security, or deploy.
risk_result: Medium risk because the local CLI, validation profile, smoke validation chain, CLI tests, schema list, and docs changed. Risk is bounded by deterministic output, negative tests for overlap, over-budget, and unsafe policy cases, local validation, security gate, review gate, and GitHub CI as an external merge gate.
unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
The command only approves prepared launch plans for consideration; any live runtime execution still requires a dedicated follow-up contract or operator launch.
merge_status: Pending pull request, GitHub CI, deterministic review gate, and required merge gates.
